title: Giro d’Italia Stage 19: Emotional Sepp Kuss Completes Grand Tour Set after Dolomite Sufferfest
content:
Colorado ace Kuss launches sizzling attack to claim stage wins at Giro, Tour, and Vuelta as Vingegaard stamps authority on GC rivals to defend pink.

Read the full article at Giro d’Italia Stage 19: Emotional Sepp Kuss Completes Grand Tour Set after Dolomite Sufferfest on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
